name: logistics fleet managers managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics fleet managers managing 5-15 vehicles, inconsistent maintenance scheduling causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide automated maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem_solved: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance scheduling leads to unexpected breakdowns.
